title: Phase 9: CoAP Resource Directory (RFC 9176)
description: Add a CoAP Resource Directory resource to the Python node CoAP server. Nodes POST to /rd with their endpoint name and link-format resources to register. GET /rd returns all registrations. DELETE /rd/<id> removes one. This lets a gateway or controller discover all resources in the mesh without querying each node directly. Exit criterion: node registers itself on startup; GET /rd returns the registration.
close_reason: ResourceDirectoryResource implemented with POST/GET/DELETE, 14 tests passing
